threat_model.scope: Web application with authentication, database, and OS interaction

threats.title: Authentication Bypass via SQL Injection
threats.description: Attacker submits ' OR '1'='1 in login form to bypass password check
threats.mitigation: Use parameterized queries (SQLite ? placeholders). Never interpolate user input into SQL.

threats.title: Insecure Deserialization via Pickle
threats.description: Attacker sends crafted pickle payload to /load_profile to execute arbitrary code
threats.mitigation: Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle. Use JSON with schema validation instead.

threats.title: Missing Audit Logging
threats.description: No logs for authentication attempts, failed logins, or admin actions. Cannot detect or investigate attacks.
threats.mitigation: Log all auth events, failures, and admin actions with timestamps and source IPs.

threats.title: Sensitive Data Exposure via API
threats.description: /api/users returns plaintext passwords and all user data without authentication
threats.mitigation: Require auth on all API endpoints; never return password hashes; apply field filtering.

threats.title: Command Injection via Ping Endpoint
threats.description: Attacker injects OS commands: host=127.0.0.1; rm -rf / to run arbitrary commands
threats.mitigation: Use subprocess with argument lists (no shell=True); whitelist allowed hosts.

threats.title: Path Traversal / Local File Read
threats.mitigation: Use werkzeug.utils.safe_join; whitelist allowed filenames; never use raw user input in file paths.

threats.title: XSS via Reflected Search Parameter
threats.description: Attacker injects <script>document.cookie</script> into search query to steal session tokens
threats.mitigation: Use Jinja2 templates with auto-escaping enabled; set Content-Security-Policy headers.

threats.title: Hardcoded Secret Key
threats.description: Static secret key in source allows session forging across all deployments
threats.mitigation: Load secret key from environment variable; generate cryptographically random key per deployment.
